title: BookPaste
description: Paste large texts into writable books and signs with automatic page splitting
body:
**BookPaste** makes it much easier to paste large amounts of text into **writable books and signs**.

Instead of stopping at the current page, it **automatically splits pasted text across pages** and continues filling the next ones for you. It tries to keep the result readable by cutting at better boundaries such as **paragraphs, lines, sentences, or words** whenever possible.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21b7161a37f2730f7784f59199f82cf7fe98fa73.gif)

If the book runs out of space, the **unfinished remainder is kept in your clipboard** so you can immediately continue in another book without losing anything. The mod also **estimates how many more books you will need** and shows that in the notification.

Mod compatible with Scholar, Stendhal and Scribble

Includes translations for the settings screen and in-game notifications in English, Русский, Українська, Deutsch, Español, Français, 日本語, Português do Brasil, and 简体中文
